findings: 16 skill directories each contain SKILL.md and agents/openai.yaml.
Plugin manifest routes skills to ./skills/.
Marketplace contains one agent-factory remote URL entry whose URL matches the Git origin.
interpretations: Required plugin and skill entry-point structure is present.

content.source: pytest -q; ruff check skills; python3 -m compileall -q skills; plugin-creator validate_plugin.py; skill-creator quick_validate.py
findings: pytest: 90 passed, 45 subtests passed.
ruff: all checks passed.
compileall: passed.
Plugin validation passed.
All 16 quick_validate checks passed.
interpretations: No deterministic test, syntax, lint, frontmatter, or plugin manifest failure was found.

content.source: intake.py check-schemas; specification.py check-schemas; work_unit.py check-schemas
findings: Intake profile 2.0.0 valid.
Five Specification profiles valid.
Work Unit profile 4.0.0 valid.
interpretations: Canonical document managers load their schemas and registered profiles successfully.

findings: openai.yaml says to check or update a Specification and its Human-facing report.
SKILL.md says not to produce Design Report HTML, CSS, or JavaScript because an external viewer derives the report.
interpretations: The starter prompt and short description can misrepresent the skill output boundary before the full SKILL.md is read.

findings: Both skills state that this repository's current Design Document package is .agent-factory/specifications/agent-factory/.
No Specification package exists in the current worktree.
interpretations: The project-specific current-package statement is unsupported by current repository state and conflicts with dynamic path/evidence rules.

content.source: README.md; codex plugin --help; codex plugin validate --help
findings: README asks developers to use Codex plugin validation tooling without naming a command.
Installed Codex CLI exposes add, list, marketplace, and remove but no plugin validate subcommand.
Bundled plugin-creator validate_plugin.py succeeds on this repository.
interpretations: The development validation instruction is not directly executable in this environment and should name the supported validator.

findings: Command exits with ModuleNotFoundError for google.auth in the current environment.
skills/google-mail/scripts/requirements.txt declares the required Google packages.
SKILL.md instructs dependency installation before running the script.
interpretations: This is an environment/dependency limitation, not a demonstrated skill contract defect.
limitations: No Gmail OAuth or live sync was attempted.

content.title: OpenAI Codex Manual: Build plugins and Build skills
findings: A plugin requires .codex-plugin/plugin.json and may include skills at the plugin root.
A skill requires SKILL.md with name and description.
Repository marketplaces use .agents/plugins/marketplace.json.
Skills should use concise trigger descriptions and progressive disclosure.
limitations: The installed CLI does not expose a plugin validate command.
